summary: The diff modifies frontend/src/App.tsx to add a mouth bite animation. The file summary and project_state.json confirm the feature is implemented with 'smile', 'open' (with teeth and tongue), and 'bitten' (flat closed) states, staying bitten until hovered again. The App.tsx content is truncated but shows the MouthState type defined and a Mouth component stub — the actual rendering logic is cut off. Based on the file summary description, all major REQ-5 requirements appear to be implemented. No files under frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/main.tsx were modified. The eye/blink/pupil code remains present and unchanged in the diff.
